title: Smoky Flaky Croatian Squash Flatbread
description: A traditional Croatian dish with a twist, featuring roasted squash, pickles, and a smoky flavor, all on a flaky flatbread. This recipe is low-fat friendly and perfect for a quick lunch or snack.
instructions: Toss the diced squash with 1 tbsp olive oil, smoked paprika, garlic powder, salt, and black pepper on a baking sheet. Roast for 20-25 minutes or until tender.
Meanwhile, heat the remaining 1 tbsp olive oil in a pan over medium heat. Add the pickle slices and cook for 2-3 minutes or until lightly browned.
Warm the flatbread pieces by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
Assemble the flatbread by spreading a layer of roasted squash, followed by a few pickle slices, some crumbly feta cheese, and a sprinkle of chopped parsley.
Optional: Drizzle with a bit of olive oil and sprinkle with additional smoked paprika for extra flavor.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 2 days.
